text: I used to hit snooze ten times and rush through chaotic mornings.
It felt like I was always scrambling to catch up, until I discovered this simple five minute
No more stress, no more sluggish mornings, just pure energy and focus all day long.
Take a moment to loosen up your body, then hydrate like a pro.
A glass of water can do wonders.
Next, set your intention for the day.
Think about what you want to accomplish.
After that, take 60 seconds to breathe deeply.
It's amazing how calming this can be.
And finally, move your body for two minutes.
Even a quick walk or light movement can make a difference.
So what's your biggest morning's struggle?
